meta.title: Dragos Sponsor Session: ICS Cybersecurity Technology Selection
meta.description:
Beginning at 11:20 Matt Cowell lays out his view of how to evaluate asset inventory and detection products. He provides an approach and a high level evaluation criteria.

The first 11 minutes is an introduction to Dragos and an overview of the asset owner challenge in evaluating ICS cyber security solutions today.
